monsters.lore: A shadow demon, dragged howling into this world from the lower planes.

monsters.name: shadow imp
monsters.lore: A shadow imp -- the realms below disowned it; the realm above is unhappy.

monsters.name: sin beast
monsters.lore: The sin beast burns with the wrath of pandemonium.

monsters.lore: The sixfirhy burns with the wrath of pandemonium.

monsters.name: bush burning
monsters.lore: The bush burning grows wherever the dark is damp enough.

monsters.name: fungus

monsters.name: seraph
monsters.lore: A seraph of the upper choirs -- patient, untiring, terrible.

monsters.name: seraph swordless

monsters.name: corrupter
monsters.lore: The corrupter keeps its own counsel, and rarely a friendly one.

monsters.name: warmonger
monsters.lore: A warmonger. Walks the lands like other mortals -- and dies the same.
